data.body: [AC #2 cleanup COMPLETE — bilateral, zero surviving artifacts] Jira: REB-877 hard-deleted via acli (verified GET -> HTTP 404). Local: ticket 8519-a58a-8af4-4830 deleted (--user-approved, tombstoned status=deleted). The orphaned binding (8519<->REB-877, both sides now gone) self-retires via the reconciler's designed path: binding_walk sees REB-877 CONFIRMED_404 -> retire-after-grace (3 passes) -> bindings-retired.json — no re-creation (the deleted local is off-snapshot, so the outbound differ never re-creates it). Backup artifacts retained + linked: pre-heal-REB-877-20260710T005736Z.json (job tmp) + git tag pre-heal-a118-20260710T005736Z (pushed to origin/tickets). ALL a118 OPERATIONAL ACs (#1 streak, #2 capped live heal, #3 flip, #4 flag-ON pass) + CODE ACs are now satisfied.
